title: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights publish report on psychological safety in AI initiatives
detailed_summary: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights released a global report, 'Creating Psychological Safety in the AI Era,' stating that 83 percent of business leaders believe psychological safety directly impacts enterprise AI success. The report frames trust, transparent communication, and a 'safe to fail' culture as important factors for scaling AI initiatives, but it does not disclose financial impact, guidance, or a material commercial transaction.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights released a global report titled 'Creating Psychological Safety in the AI Era.'
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights Report Reveals the Critical Role of Psychological Safety in Driving AI Initiatives - with 83% of Business Leaders Reporting a Measurable Impact

key_facts.fact: 83 percent of business leaders believe psychological safety directly impacts the success of enterprise AI initiatives.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights Report Reveals the Critical Role of Psychological Safety in Driving AI Initiatives - with 83% of Business Leaders Reporting a Measurable Impact

key_facts.fact: 60 percent of respondents say clarity on how AI will - and won't - impact jobs would improve psychological safety the most, while just over half (51 percent) highlight leadership modeling openness to questions, dissent and failure as equally important.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights Report Reveals the Critical Role of Psychological Safety in Driving AI Initiatives - with 83% of Business Leaders Reporting a Measurable Impact

important_text_spans.text: Despite rapid advances in AI technology, the report finds that human factors are holding enterprises back.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights Report Reveals the Critical Role of Psychological Safety in Driving AI Initiatives - with 83% of Business Leaders Reporting a Measurable Impact

sample_questions: What did Infosys and MIT Technology Review Insights report about psychological safety in AI initiatives?
What percentage of business leaders said psychological safety impacts enterprise AI success?

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document is a thought-leadership press release about an AI adoption report and does not disclose financial results, guidance, a material deal, corporate action, governance change, or regulatory matter. Infosys Topaz was excluded from products_or_platforms because it was mentioned as context, not as a launch or material platform update.
